data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. BE FEARLESS is in good form at present. Finished second at her latest appearance over 1609m at this track, beaten 6 metres. No excuses from this advantageous draw. Good enough to win a race of this calibre. 7. BOCA CHICA produced a better effort at her latest appearance when third over 1609m at Oak Grove Racing, beaten 19 metres. The driver has some work to do from this wide starting position. Has the ability to take this out. 5. ABSOLUTELY REAL didn't do a bad job when fifth over 1609m at this track last time out. 6. DOJEA GINGERALE is worth some thought after her last-start sixth when resuming over 1609m at this track on April 8.","runners":[1,7,5,6],"exclusive":false}
